reference: I am a male, twenty-five years old. My hands tremble when I lift a cup of coffee or a mobile phone. If I hold any tools, I experience severe trembling. Why is this happening and how can I avoid this problem? I do not smoke or consume alcohol, and I am unmarried.
text: I am a male, 25 years old. My hands tremble when I lift a cup of coffee or a mobile phone. If I hold any tools, I experience severe trembling. Why is this happening? And how can I avoid this problem? I do not smoke or consume alcohol, and I am unmarried.
